query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as users_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotes) as quotes_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM verifications) as verifications_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM australian_standards) as standards_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contractors) as contractors_count;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qcNV4qQD7qpkaJ4.fb5a500c82ee --database APFRAaBLqYVeRNQZ9fu2LF --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as users_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotes) as quotes_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM verifications) as verifications_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM australian_standards) as standards_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contractors) as contractors_count;
